reach_why: Extends familiar Goodhart/benchmark critiques to automated scientific taste, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links undefined capability thresholds, novelty-pruning optimization, and historically curated benchmarks into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Testable via interventions on optimization pressure and benchmark design, though key terms remain operationally vague.
explanation: Optimizing for current legibility may hide and destroy the very novelty needed for future scientific insight.
